name: Pineapple Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box (9 oz.) Jiffy golden yellow cake mix
8 ounces fat-free cream cheese, at room temperature
1 large box (5.1 oz.) instant vanilla pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 13x9 inch pan with vegetable oil spray.
3. In a medium bowl, combine cake mix, water and egg according to package directions.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 15-18 minutes or until done (Cake will be thin).
5. Cool cake in pan.
6. In a medium bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth.
7. Add pudding mix and milk; beat until well mixed and thick.
8. To assemble cake, spread cream cheese mixture evenly over cooled cake.
9. Spoon drained pineapple over this layer and spread thawed fat-free whipped topping over pineapple layer.
10. Cover and refrigerate before serving.
